name: Sourdough Pancakes #4
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the buttermilk pancake mix, active starter, milk, large egg, cooking oil, and baking powder in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Allow the batter to stand for a few moments to rest.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a hot griddle or skillet.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to look set, about 1-2 minutes per side.
6. Berries of all kinds can be added to these recipes before serving.
